students.name: Bea Smith
students.bio: I'm Bea Smith, a designer focused on creating work that feels intentional, purposeful, and provoking. I started in graphic design, building a foundation in branding, typography, and composition. Graduating from Meridian Technical Charter High School in the Design Program; Earning my Adobe Suite Certs. Over time, I realized that while I valued that structure, I wanted to push beyond it; into work that carries more personality, cultural influence and makes a difference to my clients.
students.quote: "If you're going through hell, keep going." - Winston Churchill

students.name: Justine Leinen
students.bio: I'm a Bay Area native currently studying at EWU. I love art, drawing, and music. You can usually find me watching scary movies or hanging out with my friends.
students.quote: "Never change. Or do. I'm not your boss." -Troy Barnes

students.name: Brittany Wallace
students.bio: I'm someone who loves creativity in all kinds of forms, from design and storytelling to music, games, websites, and anything with a strong visual style. I've always been drawn to making things feel personal and meaningful, whether that's building a concept for a project, creating a character, designing a layout, or chasing down the exact right vibe like it owes me money. I'm inspired by nostalgic styles, bold visuals, weird little ideas, and creative work that has personality. I'm also kind of a goofball, so I like bringing humor and fun into what I do whenever I can. My path has not always been simple, but I've learned to keep growing, trying new things, and turning my interests into something I can share with others.
students.quote: "Growth feels weird when chaos used to feel normal."

students.name: Isabella Valdez
students.bio: Hi, I'm Izzy! I'm a VCD student at EWU who enjoys graphic design, UX design, and web development. When I'm not designing, you'll usually find me drawing, playing bass, skateboarding, reading graphic novels, or working on creative projects that I don't finish.
students.quote: "The inner machinations of my mind are an enigma." — Patrick Star

students.name: Emily Herbert
students.bio: Emily Herbert is a designer and developer finishing her CS and Design degree at Eastern Washington University. With roots in cosmetology and a continued passion for the beauty world, she approaches digital design with the same instincts: precision, aesthetic intention, and a focus on how things feel to the person experiencing them. Her work spans web development, social media, and brand identity, all with an eye for what makes something feel effortlessly right.
students.quote: The sun will rise

students.name: Landon Umland
students.bio: I am a design student focusing on web design and development. I enjoy bugs, music, games, and building computers.
students.quote: "I sold my RAM to pay for tuition" - Landon

students.name: Donnie Thurman
students.bio: I enjoy web and social media design! For fun I backpack and go hiking! I like to read, draw, and do yoga!
students.quote: C'est la vie

students.name: Sydney Lincoln
students.bio: I am a baby designer (still learning) but I love visual system design, I love any and all kinds of tea, I love to do "grandma" hobbies, I have a great dane named effie
students.quote: "There are three things you can never have enough of in your life; chocolate, friends, and the theatre.

students.name: Ian Szymanski
students.bio: Ian Szymanski is a designer who specializes in marketing and branding across all mediums. Ian solves problems through simple, effective design. He believes in lifting up anyone who isn't giving their all, inspiring people to be the best forms of themselves. When not creating for others, Ian creates for himself. Playing and arranging music are both long-time hobbies for Ian. He shares his love of music with others in many ways,  even random comments about music theory to anyone who will listen.
students.quote: Hm, I'd have to get back to you on that.

students.name: Michael Bushyeager
students.bio: I am a Visual Communication Design graduate who spent four years turning coffee and indie music into brand identities, editorial magazines, illustrated fish, and car air fresheners. When I am not designing, you can find me working at LEGO in Spokane, bowling, or convincing people that Risograph printing is actually cool. I'm always looking for a good cup of coffee!  I am heading into the design world ready to make things that look good and mean something. Warm. Approachable. Intentional.
students.quote: Life is fragile. We're not guaranteed a tomorrow so give it everything you've got. - Tim Cook

students.name: Tayla Eliason
students.bio: Hello! I am a graphic design student at EWU. When not juggling school, softball, and work, you can usually find me in the middle of a book. I also have a cat, so that's cool.

students.name: Peyton Whiteley
students.bio: Peyton is an ambitious designer driven by emerging technology and future-forward thinking. They are always experimenting with new tools and pushing creative boundaries.

students.name: Jaeden Ives-Crow
students.bio:
Passionate about people. Curating experiences
that remind us of our humanity; creating
problems to solve out of spite; tending to my
two adorable felines.
I am Jaeden, and I often think too hard about nothing. I
balance this out with an overflowing store of empathy that can
sometimes get me into trouble. I think my work reflects that. I
create with the hope that my humanhood will be apparent. I try
to find out what choice I can make that is so wrong it actually
becomes the only right one. The most absolutely rightest
choice there ever was.
This can all be attributed to my Type 4 personality. I want to
be part of a community, but I want to stand out, to be unique. I
want so desperately to be understood, though no one will ever
understand me. This is my superpower.
students.quote: If you want to destroy my sweater, hold this thread as I walk away.

students.name: Amy George
students.bio:
I'm a soon-to-be EWU graduate with a diverse skill set in 3D modeling, animation, and game design. My computer science minor lets me work across both creative and technical sides of a project.
At EWU, I completed a university-funded internship designing a website for the Yakama Nation community. I've also designed my own tabletop board game and created six original 3D animations in Blender. My strengths are in 3D modeling and stylized anime-influenced character design, and I draw from cultural influences in my work.
I'm looking to work as a 3D Modeler, Animator, or Game Environment Artist at indie and motion studios like Hazelight Studios or Illumination.
students.quote: "Why are you buying clothes at the soup store?"

students.name: Kaileb Cardle
students.bio: A really nice person who has a lot to offer!
students.quote: "You better work"-RuPaul

students.name: Mads Gorder
students.bio: I am a weird, snake and cat loving artist. I love playing video games, drawing, reading Manga, and watching cartoons and anime.
students.quote: With a great degree of difficulty!

students.name: Elizabeth Hernandez
students.bio: I make videos about video games online and it makes me moneyyyy :)
students.quote: I asked for no pickles and they gave me the mcpickle pounder

students.name: Tristan Holdren
students.bio: I'm a graphic designer based out of Spokane, I'm very driven through find creative outlets in all different mediums and try to find variety through my work.
students.quote: "With great power comes great responsibility" - Uncle Ben

students.name: Kenia Uribe
students.bio: Hello, I'm Kenia, a Visual Communication Design student at Eastern Washington University and a soon-to-be graduate with a background in photography. I create Bauhaus-inspired, system-aware design focused on typography, UX, and clear visual communication that feels thoughtful, accessible, and memorable.
students.quote: An angel will never see the Devil as an angel, but to the Devil, it's the angel that is the Devil.

students.name: Jesse Gonzalez
students.bio: If you're wanting to talk about robots, animals, or superheroes, then you have my absolute attention! I love playing games, illustrating in my sketchbook, listening to some rock and metal, or hibernating in my bed.
students.quote: "Wow, I've never thought about it like that before, and I never will. I've already forgotten what you said. Goodbye forever!"

students.name: Makenna Wieck
students.bio: My name is Makenna Wieck, and I am a designer with ambition. I am currently working on my Bachelor's in Visual Communication Design. My design focus is on illustration, as Adobe Illustrator is my favorite software. I prefer illustration over user experience design or web development. I like to combine my art with design, as they are separate concepts with significant overlap.
students.quote: "I wish I had acquired wisdom at less of a price." -Hosea Matthews (Red Dead Redemption 2)

students.name: Mary Boyd
students.bio: Hello there, I'm Mary, a Washington-based designer and animator who spent years as a bookkeeper at an insurance brokerage before realizing I was a creative at heart. I pivoted from spreadsheets to animation, combining a bookkeeper's precision with a storyteller's imagination. Now, I am a high-energy creative ready to work my butt off to see my projects become a reality.
students.quote: The death of perfection is the birth of momentum.
